betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Oil Reservoir Detector§f

§aScan the ground beneath your feet to locate crude oil deposits hidden deep underground!§f

The Oil Reservoir Detector is a cheap handheld device essential for finding oil. §9Right-click§f the detector on any block to scan a thin column §e8 blocks§f wide directly below you. Move from chunk to chunk, scanning as you go, until you see the message "§bOil detected nearby§f" (§eorange§f ping) or "§bOil deposit directly below!§f" (§egreen§f ping).

§6Operation§f:
§b• Scan Range§f: Small — approximately §e8 blocks§f wide column directly below the player.
§b• Detection Messages§f: "Oil detected nearby" means you are close; "Oil deposit directly below!" means a deposit is right under you.
§b• Strategy§f: Move methodically through each chunk in the area, scanning repeatedly until you narrow down the exact location.

§cNote§f: Patches of §boily dirt or sand§f on the surface do NOT indicate standard oil deposits. They mark §bbedrock oil deposits§f which require a §bHydraulic Fracking Tower§f to extract later in progression.

§eTip§f: Mark confirmed oil deposit locations with waypoints or coordinates. A single deposit contains multiple blocks, each holding §e250mB§f of crude oil, so it is worth fully extracting before moving on.
